settings.summary: Configure `scrollbar2` as a compact bar widget or a reserve-space floating panel. Theme-aware colors use Noctalia color pickers and also allow custom hex values.

pages.layout: Placement, floating panel sizing, and the shared track and focus-line geometry.
pages.appearance: Window label styling, track colors, segment backgrounds, and focus indicator colors.
pages.behavior: Filtering, mouse controls, animation, auto-hide, and diagnostics.
pages.workspaces: Workspace indicator and Hyprland special workspace overlay controls.
pages.pinnedApps: Manage launcher behavior, spacing, colors, and the pinned app list beside the track.
pages.styleRules: Match windows by app ID, title, tags, or derived window state and override their icons, segment colors, and text styling.
pages.presets: Save and load presets, full backups, and separate custom style-rule exports.

layoutCore.label: Placement & Geometry
layoutCore.desc: Place the widget, size the floating panel, and tune the shared track and focus-line system.

motion.label: Behavior
motion.desc: Control which windows appear, how mouse input behaves, and how transitions animate.

labels.label: Window Labels
labels.desc: Adjust segment content, typography, spacing, and icon/title presentation.

colors.label: Track, Focus & Window Colors
colors.desc: Theme-aware track, focus indicator, segment, icon, and title colors, with support for custom hex values.

workspaces.label: Workspace Extras
workspaces.desc: Optional workspace indicator and special workspace overlay controls.

colorPicker.label: Select color
colorPicker.desc: Choose a theme color or pick a custom color.

opacity.label: Transparency
opacity.desc: Expand to fine-tune opacity for this color.
opacity.valueDesc: Adjust how transparent this color should be.

mode.label: Placement
mode.desc: Choose whether the bar lives in the Noctalia bar or as a reserve-space floating panel.

scale.label: Floating Panel Scale
scale.desc: Scale the floating panel renderer without changing the saved base dimensions.

margin.label: Floating Panel Margin
margin.desc: Padding between the floating panel background and the bar itself.

offsetH.label: Horizontal Offset
offsetH.desc: Move the floating panel left or right from its centered position.

offsetV.label: Vertical Offset
offsetV.desc: Move the floating panel away from or toward the screen edge.

radiusScale.label: Background Radius Scale
radiusScale.desc: Scale the floating panel background corner radius.

backgroundColor.label: Background Color
backgroundColor.desc: Theme key or hex color for the floating panel background, or `none`.

backgroundOpacity.label: Background Opacity
backgroundOpacity.desc: Opacity of the floating panel background.

gradientEnabled.label: Enable Background Gradient
gradientEnabled.desc: Overlay a transparent-to-color gradient over the floating panel background.

gradientColor.label: Gradient Color
gradientColor.desc: Theme key or hex color for the floating panel gradient.

gradientOpacity.label: Gradient Opacity
gradientOpacity.desc: Opacity of the floating panel gradient.

gradientDirection.label: Gradient Direction
gradientDirection.desc: Choose whether the gradient runs vertically or horizontally.

autoHide.sectionDesc: Automatically hide the floating panel when the pointer is away, then reveal it again from the anchored edge.

enabled.label: Enable Auto-Hide
enabled.desc: Only applies in Floating Panel mode. Bar mode stays unchanged.

revealMode.label: Reveal Mode
revealMode.desc: Choose whether the hidden panel leaves a thin visible strip or only an invisible edge hotspot.

delayMs.label: Hide Delay
delayMs.desc: How long the pointer must stay away before the floating panel hides.

durationMs.label: Animation Duration
durationMs.desc: How long the auto-hide reveal and collapse motion should take.

effect.label: Auto-Hide Effect
effect.desc: Choose whether auto-hide uses slide, fade, both, or no animation.

dynamicMargin.label: Dynamically Adjust Margin
dynamicMargin.desc: Shrink the floating panel margin and both display offsets along with the auto-hide progress so the hidden state sits tighter to the bar content.

slideDirection.label: Slide Direction
slideDirection.desc: Choose which direction slide-based auto-hide effects should move.

edgeSliverSize.label: Edge Sliver Size
edgeSliverSize.desc: Thickness of the visible reveal strip when Reveal Mode is set to Edge Sliver.

edgeSliverWidth.label: Edge Sliver Width
edgeSliverWidth.desc: Width of the visible reveal strip relative to the floating panel width.

edgeSliverMargin.label: Edge Sliver Margin
edgeSliverMargin.desc: Inset applied around the visible reveal strip from the floating panel bounds.

edgeSliverRadius.label: Edge Sliver Border Radius
edgeSliverRadius.desc: Corner radius for the reveal strip. Set to 0 to keep the automatic radius.

edgeSliverColor.label: Edge Sliver Color
edgeSliverColor.desc: Theme key or hex color for the edge sliver. Use `none` to inherit the floating panel background fallback.

sameOutput.label: Only Same Output
sameOutput.desc: Show only windows from the current screen.

scrollWheelFocus.label: Scroll to Focus
scrollWheelFocus.desc: Use scroll wheel over the bar to cycle focus between windows.

middleClickClose.label: Middle Click to Close
middleClickClose.desc: Close windows by middle-clicking their segments.

workspaceScrollSwitch.label: Scroll Workspace on Indicator
workspaceScrollSwitch.desc: Scroll the mouse wheel over the workspace indicator to switch between workspaces.

logging.label: Debug Logging
logging.desc: Write detailed snapshot and ordering diagnostics to the shell log. Use this only when debugging refresh issues.

position.label: Track Position
position.desc: For Floating Panel mode, pin the bar/panel area to the top or bottom edge.

width.label: Bar / Panel Width
width.desc: Base width of the whole scrollbar2 bar or floating panel area as a percentage of the screen width. The visible track fills this area.

verticalAlign.label: Track Alignment
verticalAlign.desc: Where the track line sits inside the transparent container.

borderRadius.label: Track Radius
borderRadius.desc: Corner radius of the track line.

leftEnabled.label: Fade Left Edge
leftEnabled.desc: Fade the left edge of the main track into transparency.

rightEnabled.label: Fade Right Edge
rightEnabled.desc: Fade the right edge of the main track into transparency.

width.label: Fade Width
width.desc: Horizontal size of each enabled edge fade.

opacity.label: Track Opacity
opacity.desc: Overall opacity of the track line.

color.label: Track Color
color.desc: Theme key or hex color for the track line.

separatorColor.label: Separator Color
separatorColor.desc: Theme key or hex color applied to the track line between segments.

shadowEnabled.label: Enable Track Shadow
shadowEnabled.desc: Render a drop shadow under the track line.

display.label: Display & Floating Panel
display.desc: Placement mode and reserve-space floating panel settings.

mouseInteraction.label: Mouse Interaction
mouseInteraction.desc: Configure mouse-based behaviors for window segments.

track.label: Track & Focus Geometry
track.desc: Width, spacing, sizing, and alignment controls for the shared track and moving focus-line system.

window.label: Window Labels
window.desc: Toggle labels, choose alignment, and configure typography and scaling.

trackColors.label: Track & Focus Colors
trackColors.desc: Theme-aware colors for the track line, separators, edge fades, moving focus indicator, and segment backgrounds.

focusColors.label: Segment Background Colors
focusColors.desc: Focused, hover, and inactive background fills for window segments, separate from the moving focus line.

windowColors.label: Window Colors
windowColors.desc: Icon and title colors for focused, hover, and default states.

filtering.label: Filtering
filtering.desc: Control which windows appear in the bar.

workspaceIndicator.label: Workspace Indicator
workspaceIndicator.desc: Show the active workspace beside the track with optional count badge styling.

specialWorkspaceOverlay.label: Special Workspace Overlay
specialWorkspaceOverlay.desc: Show the active Hyprland special workspace centered across the track.

pinnedApps.label: Pinned Apps
pinnedApps.desc: Render pinned launchers beside the track and manage per-app custom icons.

customStyleRules.label: Custom Style Rules
customStyleRules.desc: Override segment colors for matching windows using ordered regex rules.

debug.label: Debug
debug.desc: Developer diagnostics for snapshot updates and compositor ordering.

thickness.label: Focus Thickness
thickness.desc: Height of the moving focus indicator or the fade-state fill.

width.label: Focus Width
width.desc: Width of the moving focus indicator as a percentage of the segment.

borderRadius.label: Focus Radius
borderRadius.desc: Corner radius of the focus indicator.

verticalAlign.label: Focus Alignment
verticalAlign.desc: Where the focus strip sits inside the transparent container.

lineColor.label: Focus Line Color
lineColor.desc: Color of the moving focus indicator line.

enabled.label: Enable Focused Segment Background
enabled.desc: Show a background fill behind the active segment's content.

focused.label: Focused Segment Background
focused.desc: Theme key or hex color for the active segment background.

enabled.label: Enable Hover Segment Background
enabled.desc: Show a background fill behind a hovered segment's content.

hover.label: Hover Segment Background
hover.desc: Theme key or hex color for the hovered segment background.

enabled.label: Enable Inactive Segment Background
enabled.desc: Show a background fill behind inactive segment content.

default.label: Inactive Segment Background
default.desc: Theme key or hex color for the inactive segment background.

showIcon.label: Show Icons
showIcon.desc: Render application icons inside each segment.

showTitle.label: Show Titles
showTitle.desc: Render window titles inside each segment.

focusedOnly.label: Focused Only
focusedOnly.desc: Only show label content for the focused segment.

dragReorderEnabled.label: Enable Drag Reordering
dragReorderEnabled.desc: Allow dragging tiled window segments to reorder them in the compositor.

borderRadius.label: Window Radius
borderRadius.desc: Corner radius of each window segment background.

margin.label: Window Margin
margin.desc: Inset around each window segment background and its content.

paddingLeft.label: Left Padding
paddingLeft.desc: Left inner padding for window content inside each segment.

paddingRight.label: Right Padding
paddingRight.desc: Right inner padding for window content inside each segment.

paddingTop.label: Top Padding
paddingTop.desc: Top inner padding for window content inside each segment.

paddingBottom.label: Bottom Padding
paddingBottom.desc: Bottom inner padding for window content inside each segment.

font.label: Font Family
font.desc: Font family used for window titles.

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.desc: Base size of the window title text.

focused.label: Focused Font Weight
focused.desc: Font weight used for focused window titles.

hover.label: Hover Font Weight
hover.desc: Font weight used for hovered window titles.

default.label: Inactive Font Weight
default.desc: Font weight used for inactive window titles.

iconScale.label: Icon Scale
iconScale.desc: Scale multiplier applied to application icons.

iconAlign.label: Icon Alignment
iconAlign.desc: Horizontal alignment of icons inside each segment.

titleScale.label: Title Scale
titleScale.desc: Scale multiplier applied to title text.

titleAlign.label: Title Alignment
titleAlign.desc: Horizontal alignment of window titles inside each segment.

animation.sectionDesc: Animate window segments when entries appear, disappear, and reflow across the track.

enabled.label: Enable Window Animation
enabled.desc: Use dedicated motion settings for window open and close transitions.

openEnabled.label: Animate Open
openEnabled.desc: Scale and fade new window segments in when they appear.

closeEnabled.label: Animate Close
closeEnabled.desc: Keep removed windows visible briefly so they can animate out before disappearing.

type.label: Animation Type
type.desc: Choose the motion style used for window lifecycle changes.

speed.label: Animation Speed
speed.desc: Transition duration in milliseconds for window open and close motion.

focused.label: Focused Icon Color
focused.desc: Theme key or hex color for focused icons.

hover.label: Hover Icon Color
hover.desc: Theme key or hex color for hovered icons.

default.label: Default Icon Color
default.desc: Theme key or hex color for idle icons.

focused.label: Focused Title Color
focused.desc: Theme key or hex color for focused titles.

hover.label: Hover Title Color
hover.desc: Theme key or hex color for hovered titles.

default.label: Default Title Color
default.desc: Theme key or hex color for idle titles.

enabled.label: Enable Animation
enabled.desc: Animate focus movement and color changes.

type.label: Animation Type
type.desc: Choose how the focus indicator transitions between windows.

enabled.label: Show Workspace Indicator
enabled.desc: Render the active workspace beside the window track.

labelMode.label: Workspace Text
labelMode.desc: Choose whether to show the active workspace id or name.

presetText.label: Preset Text
presetText.desc: Optional prefix text shown before the active workspace value.

position.label: Position
position.desc: Place the workspace indicator on the left or right side of the track.

verticalAlign.label: Vertical Position
verticalAlign.desc: Align the workspace indicator to the top, center, or bottom.

paddingX.label: Horizontal Padding
paddingX.desc: Inner horizontal padding for the workspace capsule.

paddingY.label: Vertical Padding
paddingY.desc: Inner vertical padding for the workspace capsule.

marginLeft.label: Left Margin
marginLeft.desc: Spacing on the left side of the workspace indicator.

marginRight.label: Right Margin
marginRight.desc: Spacing on the right side of the workspace indicator.

borderRadius.label: Border Radius
borderRadius.desc: Corner radius of the workspace indicator background.

background.label: Background
background.desc: Background color and opacity for the workspace indicator.

family.label: Font Family
family.desc: Font family used for the workspace text.

size.label: Font Size
size.desc: Base size of the workspace text.

weight.label: Font Weight
weight.desc: Font weight used for the workspace text.

color.label: Text Color
color.desc: Text color and opacity for the workspace label.

badge.sectionDesc: Optional badge showing how many windows are on the active workspace for this screen.

enabled.label: Show Window Count Badge
enabled.desc: Render a badge with the active workspace window count.

background.label: Badge Background
background.desc: Background color and opacity for the count badge.

family.label: Badge Font Family
family.desc: Font family used for the count badge text.

size.label: Badge Font Size
size.desc: Base size of the count badge text.

weight.label: Badge Font Weight
weight.desc: Font weight used for the count badge text.

color.label: Badge Text Color
color.desc: Text color and opacity for the count badge.

animation.sectionDesc: Animate the workspace indicator when the active workspace changes.

enabled.label: Animate On Change
enabled.desc: Animate the workspace label and badge when the active workspace changes.

type.label: Animation Type
type.desc: Choose the motion style for workspace indicator changes.

axis.label: Animation Axis
axis.desc: Slide the workspace indicator horizontally or vertically during changes.

speed.label: Animation Speed
speed.desc: Transition duration in milliseconds for workspace changes.

enabled.label: Show Special Workspace Overlay
enabled.desc: Render a centered overlay across the track when this screen has an active Hyprland special workspace.

textMode.label: Label Mode
textMode.desc: Choose whether to show the stripped special workspace name, the raw Hyprland name, or a fixed custom label.

customLabel.label: Custom Label
customLabel.desc: Fixed text shown when the label mode is set to custom.

showWindowIcons.label: Show Window Icons
showWindowIcons.desc: Render icons for windows currently open on the active special workspace to the right of the overlay label.

widthPercent.label: Overlay Width
widthPercent.desc: Width of the overlay as a percentage of the track width.

heightPercent.label: Overlay Height
heightPercent.desc: Height of the overlay as a percentage of the available track container height.

borderRadius.label: Border Radius
borderRadius.desc: Corner radius of the special workspace overlay background.

background.label: Background
background.desc: Background color and opacity for the special workspace overlay.

family.label: Font Family
family.desc: Font family used for the overlay label.

size.label: Font Size
size.desc: Base size of the overlay label text.

weight.label: Font Weight
weight.desc: Font weight used for the overlay label.

color.label: Text Color
color.desc: Text color and opacity for the overlay label.

animation.sectionDesc: Override the general motion settings for special workspace overlay swaps and show/hide transitions.

enabled.label: Animate Overlay Changes
enabled.desc: Animate the overlay when the special workspace label or icons change.

type.label: Animation Type
type.desc: Choose the motion style for special workspace overlay changes.

axis.label: Animation Axis
axis.desc: Slide the overlay content horizontally or vertically during label changes.

speed.label: Animation Speed
speed.desc: Transition duration in milliseconds for overlay changes.

position.label: Position
position.desc: Place the pinned apps strip on the left or right side of the track.

iconColor.label: Icon Color
iconColor.desc: Theme key or hex color applied to pinned app icons.

marginLeft.label: Left Margin
marginLeft.desc: Spacing on the left side of the pinned apps strip.

marginRight.label: Right Margin
marginRight.desc: Spacing on the right side of the pinned apps strip.

hideWhenActive.label: Hide When Active
hideWhenActive.desc: Hide a pinned app whenever this widget already shows a visible window for that app.

activateRunningBehavior.label: When Already Running
activateRunningBehavior.desc: Choose whether clicking a visible pinned app focuses and cycles its visible windows or starts a new instance.

items.label: Pinned Apps
items.desc: Manage apps pinned from the window context menu and set custom icon overrides for each one.
items.empty: No pinned apps yet. Right-click a window segment and choose Pin to bar.

manager.label: Rule Editor
manager.desc: Manage {count} rule(s), reorder match priority, and expand a rule when you need its full override controls.

customStyleRules.empty: No custom style rules yet. Add one here or create one from a segment context menu.
customStyleRules.regexHelp: Patterns use raw JavaScript regex when you need them. Examples: `^firefox$` for an exact app ID match, `YouTube` for a title substring regex, or `code` for a Hyprland tag match. Floating, urgent, grouped, tagged, and duplicate-state rules also work with an empty pattern. Rules are checked top to bottom and the first match wins.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.desc: Disable this rule without removing it.

matchField.label: Match Field
matchField.desc: Choose which derived window value this regex should test against: app identity, live title, Hyprland tags, or one of the computed state matchers.
matchField.title: Window Title

pattern.label: Regex Pattern
pattern.desc: Enter a JavaScript regex pattern. Matching is case-sensitive unless you encode it in the pattern itself. Leave this empty for floating, urgent, grouped, tagged, or duplicate-state rules when you want the matcher to act as a simple toggle.
pattern.invalid: This regex pattern is invalid and will be ignored until it is fixed.

customIcon.label: Custom Icon
customIcon.desc: Optionally replace the matched app icon with a Noctalia icon from the icon picker.

segmentColors.label: Segment Colors
segmentColors.desc: Background colors applied to matched segments by state.

enabled.label: Override Focused Segment Color
enabled.desc: Apply this custom rule's focused segment color instead of the global focused segment color.

enabled.label: Override Hover Segment Color
enabled.desc: Apply this custom rule's hover segment color instead of the global hover segment color.

enabled.label: Override Default Segment Color
enabled.desc: Apply this custom rule's default segment color instead of the global default segment color.

iconColors.label: Icon Colors
iconColors.desc: Icon tint colors applied to matched segments by state.

enabled.label: Override Focused Icon Color
enabled.desc: Apply this custom rule's focused icon color instead of the global focused icon color.

enabled.label: Override Hover Icon Color
enabled.desc: Apply this custom rule's hover icon color instead of the global hover icon color.

enabled.label: Override Default Icon Color
enabled.desc: Apply this custom rule's default icon color instead of the global default icon color.

titleColors.label: Title Colors
titleColors.desc: Title text colors applied to matched segments by state.

enabled.label: Override Focused Title Color
enabled.desc: Apply this custom rule's focused title color instead of the global focused title color.

enabled.label: Override Hover Title Color
enabled.desc: Apply this custom rule's hover title color instead of the global hover title color.

enabled.label: Override Default Title Color
enabled.desc: Apply this custom rule's default title color instead of the global default title color.

blink.label: Blink Animation
blink.desc: Pulse a color overlay on the segment with a fade-in/fade-out effect.

enabled.label: Enable Blink
enabled.desc: Animate a pulsing color overlay on matched segments.

color.label: Blink Color
color.desc: Theme key or hex color for the blink overlay.

interval.label: Blink Interval
interval.desc: Duration of one full blink cycle in milliseconds.

badge.label: Badge
badge.desc: Show a small colored dot on the icon, title, or segment.

enabled.label: Show Badge
enabled.desc: Display a small indicator dot on matched segments.

color.label: Badge Color
color.desc: Theme key or hex color for the badge dot.

target.label: Badge Target
target.desc: Which element the badge should appear on.
target.title: Title

position.label: Badge Position
position.desc: Which corner of the target the badge appears in.

size.label: Badge Size
size.desc: Diameter of the badge dot in pixels.

iconPrefix.label: Icon Prefix
iconPrefix.desc: Prepend a small icon before the window icon or title.

enabled.label: Enable Icon Prefix
enabled.desc: Show a prefix icon before the selected target.

target.label: Prefix Target
target.desc: Whether the prefix appears before the icon or the title.
target.title: Before Title

icon.label: Prefix Icon
icon.desc: Choose a tabler icon to display as prefix.

color.label: Prefix Color
color.desc: Theme key or hex color for the prefix icon.

section.label: Save & Load
section.desc: Manage presets, full backups, and separate custom style-rule transfer files.

builtin.label: Built-in Presets
builtin.desc: Curated starting points that apply settings without replacing your custom style rules.

custom.label: Custom Presets
custom.desc: Your saved preset snapshots. Custom style rules are kept separate.

customRules.label: Custom Rules
customRules.desc: Export your current custom style rules or import additional rules without replacing the ones you already have.

empty.label: No custom presets yet
empty.desc: Save your current settings as a preset snapshot. Custom style rules stay separate.

backup.label: Settings Backup
backup.desc: Export or import a complete backup of settings, custom style rules, and presets.

report.label: Migration Report
report.migrated: {count} deprecated setting(s) migrated to new format.
report.unknown: {count} unrecognized setting(s) removed (file may be from a newer version).
report.customRulesIgnored: {count} custom style rule(s) ignored for preset safety.
report.addedRules: {count} custom style rule(s) ready to add.

save.title: Save Preset
save.desc: Save your current settings as a new preset. Custom style rules are not included.
save.nameDesc: A short name for this preset.
save.nameTooLong: Name must be 32 characters or less.
save.descTooLong: Description must be 120 characters or less.
save.nameExists: A preset with this name already exists.

delete.title: Delete Preset
delete.desc: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

deleteAll.title: Delete All Custom Presets
deleteAll.desc: Are you sure you want to delete all {count} custom presets? This cannot be undone.

rename.title: Rename Preset
rename.desc: Enter a new name for this preset.

update.title: Update Preset
update.desc: Overwrite "{name}" with your current settings? Custom style rules will stay separate.

details.title: Preset Details
details.desc: Review the exact settings stored in this preset.

empty.label: No stored settings
empty.desc: This preset does not contain any serialized settings.

importConfirm.title: Confirm Import
importConfirm.backupDesc: This will restore your saved settings and custom style rules, then merge presets.
importConfirm.presetDesc: Add this preset to your custom presets? Embedded custom style rules will be ignored.
importConfirm.customRulesDesc: Append {count} imported custom style rule(s) to your current list. Exact duplicates will be skipped.

bordered.name: Bordered
bordered.desc: Thick track with sharp corners and visible separators.

floating.name: Floating
floating.desc: Floating panel with background and gradient.

indicator.name: Indicator
indicator.desc: Track and focus line only, no window content.

pill.name: Pill
pill.desc: Fully rounded track with smooth focus indicator.
